ultimates.name: Mayday Burst
ultimates.description: Emergency distress burst grants guaranteed escape and rapid hull patching.

ultimates.name: Intercept Salvo
ultimates.description: Coordinated barrage rakes all enemies, shredding their defenses.

ultimates.name: Cargo Jettison
ultimates.description: Eject volatile cargo containers into the combat zone. Everything burns.

ultimates.name: Afterburner Strike
ultimates.description: Full-throttle attack run. Hit hard, hit fast, and line up the next shot before they recover.

ultimates.name: Drill Charge
ultimates.description: Overclock the mining drill and ram it through the enemy hull. Shields don't stop industrial equipment.

ultimates.name: Ghost Protocol
ultimates.description: Engage full stealth. All systems go dark. For two turns, you don't exist.

ultimates.name: Nova Barrage
ultimates.description: All weapons fire simultaneously. Everything in range takes the full broadside.

ultimates.name: Diplomatic Immunity
ultimates.description: Broadcast diplomatic override codes. All hostile ships are forced to stand down.

ultimates.name: Sensor Overload
ultimates.description: Flood every frequency. Their systems are stripped bare while yours lock on with surgical precision.

ultimates.name: Tractor Beam
ultimates.description: Lock the industrial tractor array onto the biggest threat. They're not going anywhere.

ultimates.name: Trade Embargo
ultimates.description: Invoke Guild authority to restrict enemy power systems. High-cost abilities go offline.

ultimates.name: Forge Hammer
ultimates.description: Channel the Syndicate's industrial might into a single devastating blow. The hull melts.

ultimates.name: Rally Cry
ultimates.description: The frontier never gives up. Reset all cooldowns and get back in the fight.

ultimates.name: Quantum Analysis
ultimates.description: Analyze and replicate the enemy's most powerful weapon system. Science adapts.
